title: Employment Relations Act 2000 (New Zealand)
description: New Zealand legislation governing employment relationships, including provisions on good faith dealings, union recognition, collective bargaining, individual employment agreements, and employee protections. Administered by the Ministry of Business, Innovation, and Employment.
